data.title: Verde AgriTech Navigates Challenges and Strengthens Financial Position Amidst Brazilian Agricultural Crisis
data.description:
Verde Agritech ( (TSE:NPK) ) has provided an update.

Verde AgriTech Ltd reported a challenging fiscal year 2024 due to economic and climatic adversities affecting Brazilian agriculture. Despite a significant reduction in sales volume and revenue, the company has shown resilience by renegotiating its debts, which has strengthened its financial position. The renegotiation efforts have led to substantial cash savings and reduced short-term obligations, positioning Verde strategically for future growth. The company anticipates improved market conditions in the latter half of 2025, driven by favorable geopolitical factors and a recovering global supply chain, which is expected to enhance Brazil’s agricultural profitability.

More about Verde Agritech

Verde AgriTech Ltd operates in the agricultural industry, focusing on producing sustainable fertilizers. The company is known for its innovative products that aid in carbon capture and improve soil health, targeting the Brazilian agricultural market.

YTD Price Performance: 7.81%

Average Trading Volume: 52,154

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$36.34M

data.title: GoldHaven Resources Files Q2 Interim Financials
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from GoldHaven Resources ( (TSE:GOH) ).

GoldHaven Resources Corp. has announced the filing of its unaudited interim consolidated financial statements and management discussion and analysis for the period ending January 31, 2025. This filing is a routine part of the company’s financial transparency and may impact stakeholders by providing insights into the company’s financial health and operational progress, potentially influencing investor confidence and market positioning.

More about GoldHaven Resources

GoldHaven Resources Corp. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on acquiring and exploring highly prospective land packages in North and South America. The company’s projects include the flagship Magno Project in British Columbia, the Three Guardsman Project, and the Copeçal Gold Project in Brazil, along with three critical mineral projects in Brazil.

data.title: Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Reports 2024 Financial Results and Dividend Proposal
data.description:
Tianjin Development Holdings ( (HK:0882) ) has shared an update.

Tianjin Development Holdings Limited announced the audited financial results for its subsidiary, Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., for the year ended December 31, 2024. The company reported a total operating income of RMB 1.34 billion, an increase from the previous year, while net profit decreased to RMB 185.96 million. Lisheng Pharmaceutical proposed a cash dividend distribution, subject to shareholder approval, reflecting its commitment to returning value to shareholders despite a decline in net profit.

More about Tianjin Development Holdings

Tianjin Development Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Hong Kong, with a focus on pharmaceuticals through its indirect non-wholly owned subsidiary, Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Lisheng Pharmaceutical operates in the pharmaceutical industry and is listed on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange, with a market focus on producing and distributing pharmaceutical products.

data.title: Canacol Energy Achieves Record EBITDAX Amid Strategic Expansion Plans
data.description:
Canacol Energy ( (TSE:CNE) ) has provided an update.

Canacol Energy Ltd. reported a record adjusted EBITDAX of $296.1 million for the year ended December 31, 2024, marking a significant increase from the previous year. Despite a decrease in realized natural gas and LNG sales volume, the company saw a rise in operating netback and adjusted funds from operations, driven by higher average sales prices. However, Canacol experienced a net loss due to a non-cash deferred income tax expense. The company plans to focus on maintaining and growing EBITDA, exploring new gas opportunities, and reducing debt in 2025, while preparing to commence operations in Bolivia by 2026.

More about Canacol Energy

Canacol Energy Ltd. is an energy company based in Calgary, Alberta, primarily focused on the exploration and production of natural gas and liquefied natural gas (LNG). The company operates mainly in the Lower Magdalena Valley in Colombia, with a strategic emphasis on increasing its reserves and production capabilities.

YTD Price Performance: 5.90%

data.title: Lithium Royalty Corp. Initiates C$7 Million Share Buyback
data.description:
Lithium Royalty Corp. ( (TSE:LIRC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Lithium Royalty Corp. has announced a substantial issuer bid to repurchase up to C$7 million of its common shares through a modified Dutch auction, with prices ranging from C$4.50 to C$5.20 per share. This move is part of the company’s strategy to optimize its capital structure, utilizing available cash reserves bolstered by a recent partial sale of its Tres Quebradas royalty interest. The repurchase is expected to impact approximately 2.4% to 2.8% of the company’s total equity shares, potentially enhancing shareholder value and demonstrating confidence in the company’s financial health.

More about Lithium Royalty Corp.

Lithium Royalty Corp. operates in the mining and metals industry, focusing on lithium, a key component in battery technology. The company is involved in acquiring and managing royalty interests in lithium properties, positioning itself to benefit from the growing demand for lithium in electric vehicles and renewable energy storage.

data.title: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Reports Strong Q4 2024 Results and Operational Progress
data.description:
Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals ( (TSE:EPRX) ) has shared an announcement.

Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals announced its fourth quarter 2024 financial results, highlighting significant advancements in its RESOLVE trial for eosinophilic esophagitis and a strengthened financial position with a C$44.5 million capital raise. The company reported a reduced net loss due to lower research and development costs and increased cash reserves, positioning it well for continued operations into 2026. Key operational updates included leadership changes and positive trial data, which may enhance its industry standing and stakeholder confidence.

More about Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals

Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company that utilizes its proprietary DiffuSphere™ technology to enhance drug delivery for applications with significant unmet needs.

data.title: Mullen Automotive Ends Agreement with Volt Mobility
data.description:
Mullen Automotive ( (MULN) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 14, 2025, Mullen Automotive Inc. terminated its Purchase Agreement with Volt Mobility Holding Ltd., which was initially established on August 23, 2024, and later amended on November 4, 2024. This agreement involved the exclusive distribution of Mullen’s commercial EVs in the United Arab Emirates at preferred wholesale pricing, impacting the company’s strategic operations in the region.

More about Mullen Automotive

Mullen Automotive Inc. operates in the automotive industry, focusing on the development and distribution of electric vehicles (EVs). The company is involved in producing commercial EVs and aims to expand its market presence, particularly in regions like the United Arab Emirates.

data.title: Hammond Power Solutions Achieves Record Sales in Q4 2024
data.description:
Hammond Power Solutions ( ($TSE:HPS.A) ) has provided an announcement.

Hammond Power Solutions reported record sales of $208 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, marking an 11.5% increase from the previous year, with significant growth in custom and configured products. Despite some late-year charges related to acquisitions and investments, the company achieved a record earnings per share of $1.99 for the quarter, reflecting strong operational performance and strategic capacity expansions that are expected to support continued growth into 2025.

More about Hammond Power Solutions

Hammond Power Solutions Inc. (HPS) is a leading manufacturer in the electrical industry, specializing in dry-type transformers, power quality products, and related magnetics. The company operates with a strong market presence in Canada, India, and the United States, focusing on custom and configured products for various sectors including commercial construction, data centers, and mining.

data.title: TripAdvisor Enhances Financial Flexibility with New Loans
data.description:
An announcement from TripAdvisor ( (TRIP) ) is now available.

On March 20, 2025, TripAdvisor announced the establishment of Tack-On Incremental Term B Loans under an amended credit agreement. This financial move, involving multiple lenders and led by Goldman Sachs, aims to support general corporate purposes, including refinancing existing senior notes and covering associated costs. The initiative is expected to enhance TripAdvisor’s financial flexibility and operational capacity.

More about TripAdvisor

TripAdvisor, Inc. operates in the travel industry, providing a platform for travelers to plan and book trips. The company focuses on offering reviews, price comparisons, and booking services for accommodations, restaurants, and attractions worldwide.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Announces Dividend Payments and Deferrals
data.description:
Hyperscale Data ( (GPUS) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 20, 2025, Hyperscale Data, Inc. announced a cash dividend of $0.2708333 per share for holders of its Series D Preferred Stock and a $0.20833 per share dividend for Series E Preferred Stock, covering a previously deferred payment for February 2025. The record date for both dividends is March 31, 2025, with payment scheduled for April 10, 2025. The company also decided to defer the March 2025 dividend for Series E Preferred Stock, utilizing its option to defer up to 12 consecutive monthly payments without them being considered missed. This decision reflects the company’s strategic financial management and its impact on stakeholders, particularly those holding Series E Preferred Stock.

More about Hyperscale Data

Hyperscale Data, Inc. is transitioning from a diversified holding company to focusing solely on owning and operating data centers to support high-performance computing services. The company engages in mining digital assets and offers colocation and hosting services for artificial intelligence ecosystems and other industries. Additionally, through its subsidiary Ault Capital Group, Inc., it provides mission-critical products across various sectors, including AI software, social gaming, and defense/aerospace.

Average Trading Volume: 77,726

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.06M
